mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 5.0% signals labor market deterioration and reduced consumer spending capacity, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20d returns occur in greater than 65% of instances when UNRATE exceeds 5.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad-based consumer demand growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive signals yield negative median 60d returns in greater than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strengthening manufacturing output and supply-side capacity utilization, producing positive short-term S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in greater than 60% of rising INDPRO observations.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: 20d returns remain positive in greater than 70% of high-inflation trigger months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm robust labor market tightening, supporting corporate earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Combined signal yields negative median 20d returns in greater than 50% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic activity and corporate revenue fundamentals, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal manufacturing contraction and weakening supply-side momentum, causing negative short-term S&P 500 returns.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines for two consecutive months
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in greater than 65% of consecutive decline periods.
